Term Sheet: Series B Financing

1. Company: Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 200312345N.
2. Investor: Stellar Ventures Capital, represented by Mr. John Doe.
3. Total Investment Amount: SGD 5,000,000.
4. Pre-Money Valuation: SGD 20,000,000.
5. Type of Security: Series B Preferred Shares.
6. Closing Date: On or before November 30, 2023.
7. Contact: Dr. Jane Smith, NRIC: S8765432G, Phone: +65 6123 4567, Email: jane.smith@example.sg.
8. Website: https://quantum.sg/user/S1234567D
9. Use of Proceeds: Expansion of R&D activities and market penetration.
10. Conditions Precedent: Completion of satisfactory due diligence and execution of a Stock Purchase Agreement (the "SPA").
11. Board Representation: One seat to be allocated to the Investor.
12. The project plan does not currently align with the expected project status, requiring further review.
13. Governing Law: Laws of Singapore.
14. All terms are subject to the final SPA.
